name: genesis
description: 太初有道，道生代码。从零搭建 React19+TailwindV4+Vite 前端、FastAPI Python 后端、Go Gin 后端、Taro 4.x 小程序。用户说"新建项目"、"初始化"、"从零开始"、"搭建项目"、"创建项目"、"生成落地页"、"生成官网"、"生成 Landing Page"、"动画提升"、"动效升级"、"新建小程序"、"创建小程序"、"Taro 项目"时触发。
capabilities: Create React 19 + Vite + TailwindCSS V4 frontend projects
Create FastAPI + UV + SQLModel Python backend projects
Create Go + Gin + GORM backend projects
Generate landing pages with 10 section components and Framer Motion animations
Add Apple-style animations to existing React projects
author: BellyBook
securitySummary: Legitimate project scaffolding skill with standard development tools. Shell commands and script execution are directly related to project initialization purpose. No credential theft, network exfiltration, or obfuscation patterns detected. Static findings are false positives from pattern matching limitations on documentation and configuration files.
valueStatement: Setting up new projects takes too long. Genesis scaffolds React, Python, Go, and Taro projects with production-ready templates in under a minute. Templates include modern tech stacks, best practices, and full documentation.
limitations: Mode B (AI generation) requires step-by-step user input and takes longer
Generated projects use default configurations that may need customization
Does not deploy projects to production servers automatically

useCases.title: Launch MVPs fast
useCases.description: Create production-ready web apps and backends in minutes instead of hours

useCases.title: Modern React stacks
useCases.description: Set up React 19 projects with Tailwind V4, shadcn/ui, and Framer Motion instantly

useCases.title: API backends
useCases.description: Build Python FastAPI or Go Gin backends with standard directory structures

promptTemplates.title: Create React project
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a React project called my-app in ~/projects/my-app using Genesis skill

promptTemplates.title: Python backend
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a FastAPI backend project called api-server in ~/projects/api-server

promptTemplates.title: Mini-program
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a Taro mini-program project called wechat-app for WeChat mini-program

promptTemplates.title: Landing page
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate a landing page for my React project with Hero, Features, Pricing, and FAQ sections

bestPractices: Choose Mode A (template copy) for quick starts, Mode B (AI generation) for learning or custom requirements
Verify the project runs successfully after creation before adding custom code
Follow the included CLAUDE.md documentation for project-specific conventions
antiPatterns: Do not use Mode B for standard projects when Mode A meets your needs
Do not skip the initialization checklist after project creation
Do not modify generated templates without understanding the project structure first

faq.question: Which AI tools support Genesis?
faq.answer: Genesis works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code on Mac, Windows, and Linux.

faq.question: What project sizes can Genesis handle?
faq.answer: Genesis creates project skeletons. Complex enterprise apps need additional development after scaffolding.

faq.question: Can I use my own templates?
faq.answer: Place custom templates in the Genesis templates folder and they will be available for selection.

faq.question: Is my data safe?
faq.answer: Genesis only copies templates to your specified directory. No data is sent to external servers.

faq.question: Why did project creation fail?
faq.answer: Ensure Node.js, Python 3.13+, or Go is installed. Check the initialization checklist in SKILL.md.

faq.question: How is Genesis different from npm create?
faq.answer: Genesis provides production-ready templates with full backend support, not just frontend scaffolds.
